name: Steve McClary
awards: Perfect Safety Record Award, Field Leadership Excellence
bio: Steve provides senior field command across active projects, setting the pace for safe, efficient, and quality-driven execution. His trade depth and mentorship mindset help crews solve problems quickly, protect standards, and maintain dependable project momentum.
careerHighlights: Provides senior field command across concurrent active projects.
Leads crews with safety-first standards and high execution tempo.
Transfers trade knowledge through mentorship and on-site coaching.
Protects quality outcomes by solving field issues before they escalate.
funFact: Steve takes pride in safe, code-compliant execution that keeps crews and clients confident.
certifications: CDL, Forklift Operation, Aerial/Scissor Lift Operation, Adult First Aid, Certified Locksmith, Procore Certified
